name: Zesty Grilled Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soy sauce, lemon juice, chili sauce, brown sugar, and minced garlic in a bowl.
2. Place the pork chops in a glass baking dish and pour the marinade over them.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 3-6 hours or overnight.
4. Remove the pork chops from the marinade.
5. Grill or broil the chops 4 inches (10 cm) from the heat to your desired doneness.
6. Brush the chops occasionally with the marinade.
NOTE: For best results, grill the bone side down (place the chop standing up, not laying flat on the grill).
